name: Knell
description: Ring the death knell. Headshots briefly turn this scoped pistol into a rapid-fire, Critical Damage fiend that uses no ammo. When used by Harrow, Knell has a 2-round mag.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Ring the death knell. Headshots briefly turn this scoped pistol into a rapid-fire, Critical Damage fiend that uses no ammo. When used by Harrow, Knell has a 2-round mag.

components.name: Cryotic
components.description:
Usually found in extreme sub-zero environments, Cryotic instantly freezes anything it contacts.

Location: Excavation Missions on Venus, Earth, Phobos, Europa, and Neptune

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Knells unlimited ammo not functioning after you've Transferred to the Operator.

patchlogs.name: The New War: Hotfix 31.0.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Harrow Prime not giving weapon passive bonus (additional shot in the magazine) to the Knell/Knell Prime.
Fixed Knell Prime not displaying correctly when Dual Wielding.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 25.4.1 + 25.4.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Knell forcing a reload when empty even if you got a headshot.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.0.1
patchlogs.changes: Synth Charge Mod no longer applies to Pistols with < 5 Ammo Magazines (Knell, etc). Mod description has been updated to reflect the ‘Requires Magazine 5 or higher’ restriction.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Update 22.20.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Knell gaining multiple procs for a single shot on Client.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.7.0
patchlogs.changes: The Knell's headshot buff now decays only 1 stack at a time and lasts for 2 seconds per stack for a total of a 6 second decaying buff.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Mesa’s Peacemaker disabling custom reticles for Snipers/Knell/etc.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed incorrect projectile sounds with the Zarr and Knell.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Knell's Penitence buff not removing when the duration was complete.
Fixed the Knell not displaying its Penitence buff icon in Conclave.
Fixed the Knell not updating it’s scope UI correctly in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash when hitting enemies with the Knell while zoomed (32-bit only).

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.additions: Harrow’s signature Secondary weapon, the Knell, has the utility of a sniper with the sight and zoom with the convenience of a pistol. This single round magazine sidearm grants 100% ammo efficiency for 3 seconds (that can be refreshed when active) and 0.5x Critical Damage added per headshot with a maximum of 3 stacks.
